title: Gekijôban Shirubania Famirî: Furea kara no okurimono
original_title: 劇場版 シルバニアファミリー フレアからのおくりもの
overview: In the enchanting village of Sylvania, Freya, a sweet Chocolate Rabbit girl, tackles two fun tasks for the Star Festival: picking the "Tree of the Year" and finding a birthday gift for her mom. With her adorable animal friends, she goes on a joyful adventure, learning about friendship and giving.
